table.style: border-width:0px; border-spacing:0px; border-collapse:collapse; cell-border-width:1px; border-color:#000000; border-style:solid;

para.style: text-align:center; margin-top:5px; margin-bottom:5px;

para.text: *典型示例为 2A+2B 堆栈。堆栈数量按 1A+1,2A+2B 或 3A+3B 的顺序排列。

para.style: text-align:center; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:14px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:159px left ;

para.style: text-align:center; margin-top:5px; margin-bottom:5px;
para.text: 用于 APC 机床的电磁阀歧管（每托盘 2A + 2B）*

body.para: 根据顺序，堆栈数量可以是 1A+1B 或 2A+2B。

para.style: text-align:center; page-break-before:always;

text-align:center; text-indent:0px; margin-top:0px; margin-right:0px; margin-bottom:14px; margin-left:0px; line-height:1.00; background-color:transparent; white-space:normal; page-break-inside:auto; page-break-after:auto; border:none; tabstops:159px left ;
